programmes.show_description: The Things We Do for Love: When a beautiful woman is found dead, the list of suspects leads Jack Frost into the heart of a religious community where someone is thinking impurely.
Foggy Night: Enduring '70s sitcom about a chirpy bus driver and his conductor. Stan has to pull off the road when freezing fog blankets the Home Counties and makes visibility nil.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
All for Love: Detective drama series. Det Supt Charles Wycliffe faces a race against time to recapture a dangerous escaped prisoner.
The Trojan Horse: Wycliffe is sceptical about a man's distraught claims about his missing wife until a ransom note is found and a body is discovered at the wheel of a crashed car.
The Gift of Promise: When a businesswoman is bludgeoned to death, it looks like a case of blackmail gone wrong but there is a decades-old secret at the heart of the case.
Greenshaw's Folly: Miss Marple helps a friend seek refuge at Greenshaw's Folly. But a shadow soon begins to fall over the various inhabitants living there.
The Theft of the Royal Ruby: Poirot is looking forward to Christmas on his own, but when the nation's security is threatened, he is called in to help track down a stolen ruby.
Ed Chamberlin presents coverage of racing from Sandown and Wolverhampton - the feature race is at Sandown with the big Imperial Cup handicap ahead of the 2026 Cheltenham Festival.
Things That Go Bump in the Night: The murder of an undertaker takes Barnaby and Scott to a village where residents are divided about the rights and wrongs of a spiritualist church.
The Blacktrees Prophecy: When a survivalist is found murdered in his bombproof shelter, Barnaby unravels a plot that reveals how far people will go to escape the end of the world.
The Debt of Lies: When the latest resident of a police retirement community is found dead, the tight-knit group regard a murder on their doorstep as both an affront and a challenge.
Darkwater: DCI Vera Stanhope must scrutinise the fractured relationships of a community when the body of a teenage boy is found in a reservoir in a remote rural town.
Stranger in the House: Detective drama series. DI Frost exposes a junior officer to danger in his effort to trap a particularly dangerous rapist that is at large on his patch.
Going Steady: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a chirpy bus driver and his conductor pal. Stan's attempts to woo the inspector's niece at a dinner party end in disaster.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
Charades: Detective drama series. Wycliffe and his team move in to investigate the death of a man found blasted by a shotgun at a Cornish holiday home.
Lost Contact: A body with gunshot wounds to the head is washed ashore. Although the corpse is unidentifiable, two women each claim that it must be their missing husband.
The Dead of Winter: When a body is found on an Oxford tour bus, Lewis and Hathaway are led to a sprawling Oxford estate where Hathaway spent much of his childhood.
Deguello: The murder of an Oxford librarian and a local tragedy test Endeavour and the team to their limits, as they uncover the truth behind the crime that has haunted them all.
City Slickers: Comedy-drama series. Louisa deals with some new and very annoying neighbours, Mrs Tishell visits the Doc with a rash, and Joan and Bert have their cars keyed.
The Admirer: Comedy-drama series. Louisa is angry to discover that she has a rival for Martin's affections, and Joan finds that she has an admirer who is 30 years younger than her.
Orpheus in the Undergrowth: Light-hearted drama series. Laura is planning to construct a memorial garden near her daughter's home when the body of an alcoholic is found at the site.
They Understand Me in Paris: Drama series about two gardeners who are amateur sleuths. The duo are restoring the gardens of a French villa when their host's husband is found dead.
Detective drama series. When a body is found on a bus during a morning rush hour in Bath, the duo are sucked into a mystery involving a precious artefact.
Endless Night: While staying with a recently widowed friend, Miss Marple meets charming drifter Mike Rogers. Events then take a sinister turn when a dangerous killer strikes...
A Grain of Truth: The world of organic baking begins to crumble after a series of incidents at the newly-revamped Larkton's Mill.
Blind Spot: DCI Vera Stanhope investigates the murder of a trainee forensic psychologist found dead on a Northumberland landfill site.
